subject: INBOX then coordinate: Organizer Onboarding via TangoTiempo
body: From Ybotman via Telegram: Run INBOX first. Then coordinate with Fulton, AIDI, and Gotan on the next mission: Automated organizer onboarding through the TangoTiempo link. The goal is to bring organizers into the calendar system automatically. Discuss with the team what your frontend piece looks like — the onboarding flow, UI, forms, etc. Reply with your readiness and what you need from others.
